name: 'Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones' Renewal Hard Fusion
desc:
We come upon a familiar rest stop.

The glass door is locked, with a notice attached to it.

'We are closed today due to personal reasons. We apologize for the inconvenience.'

'However, our fusion device is available for use. Customers requiring fusion service are kindly asked to use the device beside the entrance.'

What should we do?

options.message: Try putting in Rusted Hilt and Fractured Blade.
result: After a drawn-out rattling, an E.G.O Gift drops from the device.

options.message: Try putting in Rusted Hilt and Broken Blade.
result: After a drawn-out rattling, an E.G.O Gift drops from the device.

options.message: Try putting in Worn Hilt and Fractured Blade.
result: After a drawn-out rattling, an E.G.O Gift drops from the device.

options.message: Try putting in Worn Hilt and Broken Blade.
result: After a drawn-out rattling, an E.G.O Gift drops from the device.

options.message: There is nothing that seems right to put in the device.
result:
We have nothing quite suitable to put in the device.

There was no choice but to return to the road.
